parsed.recommendation_text: The MacBook Air M4 is the best choice for a student due to its ultralight design, all-day battery life, and macOS ecosystem. It offers excellent performance for everyday tasks and light creative work, making it ideal for coursework and projects. The 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display provides sharp visuals, while the fanless design ensures quiet operation. Although the base storage is limited to 256GB, expandable options are available. With a quality score of 87/100 and a price point under $1100, it offers great value for its performance.
